epigraph.quote: we coraged up warmly + went for a beautiful moonlit walk on the common in a full moon

per_stop.quote: We had an emergency lunch crammed in the van at the village bus stop, although the sun shone warmly.
we coraged up warmly + went for a beautiful moonlit walk on the common in a full moon
We parked at in the New Forest near LadyCross + walked through beautiful trees. We saw deer 3 times
William rode on a motor bike, + John on a car. We went in an old bus + on the monorail.
Both sites have been lovely, especially as they are empty
We set off to Lymington & wandered around the town looking at market stalls, seeing the quayside too.
Edward had spent £7 of his QE II left-over money on fireworks, + John + Charles stood at the window to watch them all.
It has been a fabulous year's camping.
